title: Craft That Nametag
description: Simple mod that adds a crafting recipe to the Minecraft Nametag
body:
This is a simple Minecraft mod that just adds a single thing a recipe to the Minecraft Nametag
![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/yBY48Qq.png)
